Full_Review: Tiny room but as almost every other hotel in the area   Excellent location and efficient staff

We only stayed for one night however we had a member of staff walk into our room at 8 am I am assuming this was housekeeping however since we were checking out in three hours we saw this as pointless and quite rude There wasn t a knock or announcement the staff member just walked in   The location is perfect The Eiffel Tower was a 2 minute walk away which meant we could sneak out before the crowds and catch the sunrise over the Eiffel Tower then go back for breakfast The staff at check in check out were fast and efficient A large selection of food available for breakfast Go down early as it got really busy from 9 am onwards The price was a little steep however in comparison to other properties available it was worth the money

Rooms too small Coffee cups very tiny paper disposable cups Smells at the corridors Front of hotel full of rubbishes  Location cannot see the effel tower from the hotel but it is 2min walk to the tower Staff nice Kids under12 free buffet

We were left around waiting for a long time at check in and out We found reception to be without staff and you couldn t get through to reception while trying for 30 minutes so we gave up We had no hot water from 9am we last checked at 11am and still none to be told by reception that was normal We took drinks back to our room on Friday night and they were still left in the room on departure on Monday The mini bar was never refilled from Friday night over the whole weekend   The location was brilliant and the hotel was clean
The view of Eiffel Tower was quite disappointed but you can see 60 of the tower   Great location Clean and useful interior Free mini bar It is modern and good hotel

Everything was wonderful Perhaps there could have been more choice with room service but this is just a small observation   The rooms are very clean and beautifully decorated with comfortable beds and lovely bathrooms We had a two bed apartment which was huge This hotel has great ambience and the staff were very friendly

The reception desk personal is not very professional Asked them to make a booking for a taxi to the airport and although I got a booking N the next morning transpired the taxi was not booked after all or they could not figure out which is the booked taxi company clueless We had to look for a random taxi in front of the hotel were late for the airport which with the current airport security measures it is a disaster   The location of the hotel is excellent there is a view of the Eiffel Tower it is close to metro and tram stations The menu of the restaurant is limited but the food is good and the service is good Restaurant personal is very friendly

Having paid 310 per night the Duty Manager expected me to pay room service for some English breakfast tea bags that were not standard in the room but available freely in the breakfast room His reply was if we provide them for you we would have to supply 100s to other residents I was flabbergasted and bought the tea bags from a nearby shop for 3 euros Having stayed there the last five years IT WILL BE THE LAST
Almodt cero toiletries the room cleaning was not the expected Papers at the floor was found agter the cleaning   Is accesible the location is near Eiffel Tower Thats great

plugged in my US converter but kept tripping room power But staff quickly found out the problem and fixed it   Breakfast was awesome The french know their pastries We got their before check in time but the staff were very nice and gave us the room couple of hours before check in time Also they let us store our luggage after check in until our outbound train Also the guy at the bar was great he made a custom drink for us that we really enjoyed Who says the french are rude

When i reached hotel they informed me that the reservation is canceled and I have to show them that my booking was valid However they solved the problem  The room was very small for family and even for coubles with two big bags

Staff wasn t super helpful and we couldn t enter the parking lot with our driver or when we were just walking back to the property Bathroom was a separate tiny square in the room and hot with no ventilation We upgraded and I felt like it wasn t worth the extra money we spent I tried calling the house keeping to ask for missing items in our room and they never came We had breakfast one of the mornings and decided we could find better and less expensive by walking around the city to a bakery   Location was great for the Eiffel We got to watch it sparkle at night from our room which was magical

The maid did not re stock the shower body wash or coffee for the room   The hotel staff were very friendly and accommodating the hotel was in a very safe and secure location with fantastic views and easy commute

The room was a little cramped for two people the tea coffee making facilities were very basic no breakfast tea bags we booked a breakfast on our last day which was poor value for money and they ran out of most things  The location was amazing right next to the Eiffel Tower the staff were helpful and the room was clean the fridge in the room was particularly useful as it was so hot whilst we were there we put drinks in there

the staffs need to be well trained as they GAVE THE KEYS OF MY ROOM to another guest it s made me VERY WORRIED and VERY UNHAPPY that I couldn t trust leave my personal belongings in the room x I was taking my shower when the other guests opened my room door and let their self in   very good breakfast
The breakfast was generous but quality could be improved Coffee machine slow   Proximity to Eiffel Tower and transport Beds very comfortable Rooms very clean

Restaurant manager I ordered beef carpaccio and they brought out salmon and he tried to tell me it was beef I had to get another member of staff to change it as manger just tried to walk away telling me yes it is beef then charged me 13 euro for a side of fries my actual meal was only 14 euros  Close to tour de Eiffel

Disastrous check in process the worst of any hotel I ve experienced Very inefficient at respecting my reservation details Very unfriendly lady checking in the breakfast guests Bathroom design is very poor leading to everything becoming wet if showering   good location

I found it little expensive but still its value for money  I loved the location of property only 2 to 3 minute walk from effile tower The environment of the property was peacefull clean property Staff was coperative and friendly especially reception staff brilliant Efficent management with clear goals and objectives breakfast was amazing true picture of france hospitality values

The restaurant was booked for a private functions on the first 3 nights of my stay I wasn t told about this when I checked in at 3 00 only when I arrived expecting dinner at 7 00pm  Staff were very helpful they spoke excellent english the food was excellent

No support from most of the stuff Room Small and they won t give you two connect rooms separated bath room from Toilet Parking expensive and sometimes no place to park All detailed in the 4 Stars hotels are missing There are no amenities even a slippers not available etc   Just the place and one of the receptionist called Ezziden was very cooperative

The gardens in front and around the hotel can be improved to be more pleasing to the tourists   Location is excellent considering it is very near the Eiffel Tower which is one of the major attractions in the city
No milk in fridge for tea drinkers and only paper cups no china mugs   Size of room and location were good Got upgrade to a superior room Breakfast was good

What I didn t like is that when I did the reservation and got there they told me that the breakfast was included but then they told me that I had to pay for each breakfast which was too much That s very unacceptable by telling me that the breakfast was included but somehow it wasn t There was no room view and the bathroom is very uncomfortable   The staff and personnel is very kind They help their visitors with any type of concern I would probably book with this hotel again but most likely in a different room where I can have a view
The draught beer in the bar was terrible two different brands from different pumps maybe the pipes need cleaning  Great selection at the breakfast buffet
the shower took a long time to drain so if you have more than one person you have to stand in their old shower water   It was 90 degrees our first day there and air conditioner worked well

room could have been a little bigger for 3 adults very pricey but great location  nice selection of breakfast great walking distance to Eiffel tower staff was fairly helpful easy access to transportation and walking around the area

The staff on reception weren t as helpful or as friendly as I m used to I found the bed was quite hard and the pillows weren t comfortable either Breakfast was really expensive and I thought the dinner menu wasn t great either I m vegetarian and there were not many options   I loved the location the Eiffel Tower was literally two minutes walk from the front door of the hotel The design of the hotel itself was nice and the rooms were nice as well

Our room was booked for three persons We got a typical one bedroom with a double and a sofa bed they removed the bedside table to allow room for the sofa bed and there was no chair No space to move around and for the price very bad and certainly would not re commend to anyone unless single   Staff were very attentive

Not enough milk to make coffee for the no of us sharing the room and on top of it thin plastic cups Tiny rooms Hardly any space to move Curtains looked untidy Ugly room view Very noisy cleaners they talk and laugh at the top of their voices So NO privacy and respect for tired guests sleeping in early morning because of touring and returning late at night The outlay of the room is very impracticle Very tight around mirror bar fridge and entrance Although the hotel is located very close to the Eiffel Tower which is a BIGG attraction it is overpriced for what it offers due to it s location and I found the decor and outlay quite poor Very expensive accomodation for what you get No breakfast incl in accomodation Reception understaffed always busy so guests are kept waiting to be served Laundry is s expensive especially over weekends and there is no retractable washing line in the bathroom Airconditioning is feeble   How close to the Eiffel Tower and some of the other sights it was in walking distance

They did forget about my booking but did sort it out   Love how close too the Eiffel Tower you was the staff was very nice and helpful the did forget about my booking but they upgraded me for that problem
None  Very near the eiffel tower accessible to all kinds of transportation has clean rooms and surroundings The staff are friendly and it s worth it
No complimentary for toothpaste and toothbrush no shampoo Room is too small for two The furniture is too small as like table and armchair   Friendly staff and good location

I have nothing negative to say from my experience at the hotel   The staff were very friendly the suite was very comfortable the decor throughout was lovely and the distance to the Eiffel Tower was less than a 5 minute walk
The room is a little small   The staff are very helpful very polite fantastic location 4 mins walking to the subway and many attractions are around the hotel

Breakfast brunch was too expensive for the quantity and quality of food We ate at the Pullman in the morning Had to ask for extra soap at the desk The maids would not give anything extra when asked These items however were of minor issues the desk handled it all   Very accommodating staff at check in Location was very good Quiet and easy access to transportation

The room was ok but not amazing No crockery paper cups No robe Very little in way of toileteries Maybe it s better if you have a suite we just had a twin room   Position of hotel was great very near Eiffel tower near to Seine and river boat bus tours Lots of nearby places for breakfast

It s ok as a bed for the night if you re spending all your time sightseeing This hotel is not 4 star standard in my opinion and very poor for an Accor owned hotel It s in need of a major facelift Don t expect anything but French TV No movie selections We also paid for a privilege room which was no different to most standard hotel rooms smaller in my opinion and didn t get a view of the Eiffel Tower I will be using Air BnB for my next stay in Paris   Easy access to Eiffel Tower Central Paris Great cafes nearby

Staff are not helpful We found a leakage under the water basin and called the front desk they said will handle and we have no answer after 10 minutes We went down to the front desk and the staff said cannot change to another room because it was full and can only change for us on the next day we booked for 4 consecutive nights The next day morning no one follow up we have to talk to the staff morning shift again which wasted us a lot of time They request us to come back before 4pm to pack our luggage and change the room we were advised that if after 4pm the housekeeper may not be able to clean our room No shower caps provided I asked front desk again they said will bring to the room and again seems my message was being ignored I stayed here in 2012 and was very satisfied but now I would say I will never stay in this hotel anymore   Excellent location
Better showers we managed to get water all over the bathroom We are used to standing under the shower not used to hand held  Breakfast was great easy to use public transportation

Pretty much everything The bed was the worst it was a queen size bed for me and my partner but we felt like the edges made us roll off so we both tried squashing in the middle of the bed The service desk never picked up our calls There was no toothbrush or paste The room stunk every time we walked in Probably rather stay in a motel next time   Only thing I like was when walking OUT OF THE HOTEL you can see the Eiffel Tower

I love the Mercure hotels have stayed in many now but security on the door needs to be all night At the smoking area which is at the entrance to the hotel a chinese man was at the smoking area when two people came up to him and stole his bag off his arm It was so upsetting to see this man so upset They need tighter security at the entrance we come to Paris to enjoy the sights not to be stolen from I kept my bag over my body all the time so did the chinese man they distracted him and took his bag off his body I had a lovely four day break but unfortunately this is what I remember the most now  location good and beds comfortable

Limited room service food selection Housekeeping delivery of requested item takes long time   The note and heart candy left by the hotel in our room as my wife and I celebrated our anniversary The upgraded room with Eiffel Tower view The very nice lobby reception and elevator
I paid extra to get a view of Eiffel Tower but still my room was obstructed by Pullman hotel   Location very near Eiffel Tower as well as train metro station

I hated the service I went out my room was not clean I have to request it to be cleaned they did not change the sheets and when I asked they says the change the sheets every 2 days the gel soap missing and they were none until the next day morning after I called for it more than 2 times The staff are not really helpful no responsiveness no empathy and reliability  The hotel was convenient located just a few minutes walk from Eifel tower and Bir Hakeim underground station No far to Champs Elysees and Arc de Triomphe Breakfast was very good with variaty choice the have restaurant on site but did not like the food

My bag is stolen in the lobby Uneducated security had to wait for a receptionist under an emergency No apologize no information After 2 days still waiting the details from them They try to avoid their responcibility

The room toilet was very small who planned the room Why they didn t put the toilet into the bathroom everything was perfect but the toilet The front desk staff was very gentle and keep smiling and helping But on the breakfast area the staff was very rude the behaviours and the mood were very negative   At breakfast Fruits and Croissants are very good plus honey and Nutella Also the room was very comfortable minibar was free also there was a safe for your valuables and your laptop Bathroom was very nice white and bright
The bed was extremely comfortable and the room was immaculate The staff was friendly and room service was so quick I would definitely stay here again

Bathroom is a bit small but not in an uncomfortable way   Location of this place is out of this world You literarily get out of the lobby and here you go the Eiffel tower is right in front of you 3 minutes walk and you can be right below it You save a ton of money if you book this as opposed to the one next to it Pullman which I checked and was ridiculously more expensive They are literarily next to each other Staff is super nice and helpful Since restaurants close at around 10 pm and we arrived at midnight they have some sandwiches and drinks in the lobby for purchase Room very clean
Room was not facing the Eiffel tour when I book it it did say it that will face to the Eiffel tour It was privilege Room breakfast was not included Did charge very much per person   Over all was ok
Fitness centre was small and limited equipment   Excellent scrambled eggs Claude made us lovely cocktails in evening Definitely would go back for another visit

Hotel staff were very helpful from directions to recommendations for eating drinking Having Nespresso machine helped getting up in the morning Hotel is within 5 10 walk of Eiffel Tower and 2 mins away from metro station Great view from outside of the Eiffel Tower

We did not like that the pillows were so small  The breakfast was great The staff were friendly but there were other charges that we didn t agree on even though I called in advance and asked if it was okay to check in early

Everything not clean bed broken baby cot broken and dirty no robes or slippers no toiletries 1cup for coffe when there was 3 of us very poor for 1 night paid 215 not worth it not happy at all  Nothing

Front office is not helpful at all Pretend to be busy all the time which actually they are not Very rude and sarcastic when ring to them for an urgent help Can just hang up the phone by telling busy Been to many countries and stayed in many other chain hotels but this is the worst experience I have ever had Will DEFINITELY discourage anyone from staying here   Only location near to Eiffel Tower I think there are a lot of other hotels at other area and we can just get to Eiffel Tower easily

Toiletries very poor no conditioner or body cream and besides the body wash and shampoo being in one not good also the container in shower was empty and not enough pillows   The breakfast was excellent tasty sausages lovely fresh croissants coffee machines in poor condition

Half door in the bathroom makes no sense as water still gets on the floor Also the restaurant does not have a kids menu for lunch and or dinner which makes dining with a child almost impossible Only thing my son liked on the menu was the ice cream dessert   The location was perfect A few mins from the Eiffel Tower and from 2 Metro stops Made getting around Paris super easy
Quite expensive for an average size room and basic facilities but it s the location you re paying for   Average size room with good air con and as close as you can get really to the Eiffel Tower

Bathrooms A bit cramped Plus I requested an Eiffel Tower view and willing to pay but was refused and given standard room instead Check in staff a bit rude   Location to Eiffel Tower and place felt safe

Small rooms but we are in Paris after all And not really very cosy in the reception area s so didn t hang around much We were told their was no normal rooms left and only priviligre rooms but when we got there the difference in these rooms was a dressing gown and offer of a small free mini bar so not sure why we couldn t have had the normal room rate without the extra s put in for us   Easy to find easy to park clean and close to the Eiffel tower Great for pets as lots of grass nearby and walks Nice hotel
small baths bad cleaning the bathrooms smelled to urinate Small room uncomfortable poor care to enter very basic breakfast options It is a very basic hotel to be 4 star   CheckOut is very fast

OMG I don t know where to start Rooms was mesrible with the cheep quality of furniture Toilets so bad and dirty reality was totally different then what we saw in pictures No nesspreso machine was given No iron and no slippers No bottle of waters Not recommended if hygiene is important for anyone   Nothing good about the hotel Just the location

I really can t think of a bad word that could be said We loved our stay   Very comfy bed and the staff were great Very friendly I stayed here to propose to my girlfriend and thanks to the service being so great from Dominic on the desk and everyone else there it went perfect and she said yes
Price is too high Breakfast is very poor Room service is not bad but served with ONLY ONE can of free water   Location of the Hotel is good The Room is quite and the Bed is comfort

I had few issues with the cleaner of our room since they didnt change the bed sheets and inhad to request it everytime personally Yhe managerbof he house keepers was very friendly and cooperative though attending every single request   The location is superb just 5 minutes walk from Eiffel tower and from my room i had partial Eiffel view

The lunch there was delicious but it took asking 4 servers to bring us our left over food in a to go box Also I requested via email through booking com 2 months before to have an Eiffel Tower view We did not get that view instead we got a view of ugly apartment buildings under construction   The breakfast and room was great
Great location quick walk to the greatest monument in Paris close to great restaurants lovely staff and they remembered it was my birthday when I checked in which was lovely
Air conditioning did not work on the second room The give us a small fan They did not fix the ac or offer to move us to another room  Bed and bathroom

No hallal food all the coffee was decafenated no hallal meat for breakfast although they had bacon ham sausages absolutley terrible considering paris is full of arab tourists And we only eat hallal food never going back again and even if i ate what was on offer there wearnt alot of chiicea to choose from  Its was close to the eiffell tower although i wished i stayed at the pullman wich was even closer and i know through past experience the pullman do a wide variety of breakfasts hallal nin hallal vegetarian the lot

We had a room for 3 people was clean and comfortable although a little snug for 3 Bathroom very small although clean Toilet is tiny and separate from the bathroom which we found strange   Amazing location literally at the foot of the Eiffel Tower Staff really friendly helpful welcoming Great value for money too great price considering the amazing location

what could have been better ALL OF IT the fact that we had go practically beg for more sugar and milk for our coffee was awful i paid such a lot of money and i was expecting so much more than what i got i booked this hotel over all of the others because the pictures lead me to believe i could see the eiffel tower from my window totally not true i was completely fooled it s expensive and really not worth it at all   the staff were lovely

This time the rate included breakfast and I took it however go for breakfast was not a good experience 2 Orange juice machines not working No glasses for juices Another coffee machine was not working either If the breakfast is self service everything has to be working perfectly  I usually use this hotel in Paris The location is perfect

Very friendly staff It was our first time in this hotel and we ve been chosen as Guest of the day and been upgraded to a privilege room Thank you so much for making our trip in Paris a truly memorable one

Far to expensive cost me 186 per night and an additional 30 Euro per night for a view of the Eiffel Tower they did not mention that the view was just the top third of the tower as there is a huge hotel blocking the view The room was tiny and had only 1 bedside table and no dressing table No bath only shower and a tiny toilet cubicle it was like an airplane toilet cubicle Breakfast is rubbish too   Location was good
Rooms very small even upgraded superior Beds uncomfortable Breakfast like a six nations rolling maul Self service area poorly positioned   Great location
Room was kind of small   The door staff were very pleasant very professional and very helpful like giving me a paper map and good instructions to navigate to the A13 after my GPS died

Housekeeping we had to chase after replacement of shower gel towels tea in spite of even leaving notes for the staff to replace what had been used To add insult to injury the phone didn t work during the last night when we needed Reception  Good sized room clean and very comfortable bed The view of the Eiffel Tower although at an additional premium was a plus as it is a magnificent landmark The breakfast buffet was varied and exceptionally good This is the second time we ve been here and hopefully we ll be back Rail Metro connections are also excellent

Being a privileged guest i was disappointed that i needed to ask for the mini bar to be replenished also only one bath robe and slippers and when the fridge was replenished there was just 2 coke and 1 orange juice also needed to remind staff about the champagne as they forgot to deliver it at the pacific time   The view of the eiffel tower was amazing from the bedroom floor 11 room 1135

When booking it say it look out on to the Eiffel Tower The room was on the top floor floor 12 the windows did not open the room was small at got very hot we did ask to be moved to another room but all rooms booked our room looked out onto the car park
Booked room 6 months in advance but still didn t get a view of the Eiffel Tower requested a change but had no rooms free Pillows were too hard  Location great for tower

The receptionist desk need to be improved Lack of english quite slow in processing check in They just have a few restaurant around there and it quite pricey but overall its a good stay   The location was superb We just have a night in paris And it make us easily access to see Eiffel easily The room is clean we love to stay in this hotel the man who help us bringing the bag was super friendly and helpful

Although the staff were not rude they weren t terribly friendly It was a bonjour and straight to the point and you were lucky if you got a smile this applied to every single member of staff I spoke to at the hotel A simple how are you or how was your journey isn t too much to ask On our third day there my sister was very unwell with a cold I rang up reception and asked for a bottle of water to which she replied you have had your one free bottle for the stay you will have to come down and pay for one I then pleaded that my sister was unwell and so the lady asked me to call housekeeping who did not pick up I m not sure how to describe how frustrating it was that a hotel would not give me one bottle of water when somebody was ill without me having to beg for it and even then I didn t receive it and had to walk down to the local shop I didn t bother complaining at reception because the staff were not approachable at all It s really a shame because it s a fantastic location and the staff really do just give me a negative connotation of mercure hotels now and I would hesistate before booking one again   Fantastic location clean room
More milk and tea in the room Scrambled egg was a bit too creamy and the bacon was almost cremated  Location brilliant Reception good Staff helpful Room nice

Small rooms Mattress Smelly toilets cold room Booking com didn t understand that it wasn t this mercure that I was reserving I wanted the one close to the Champs Elys es That has a view of the Eiffel Tower So it doesn t work when you expect a location and end up somewhere else   Staff Cleanliness The view The food Early check in Express check out Location

The bathroom is too small in the rooms I didn t like that the toilet and shower was in a separate room which was small and you didn t have enough room to move around The pictures online don t show how small the bathroom is I also think it was overpriced for the room I stayed at much better hotels for less than what I paid at Mercure And we arrived at night time and couldn t find the hotel because the display lights were off at the top of the hotel The hotel was located on the side of Pullman Hotel which was hard to find at night Luckily people were friendly enough to help us find the hotel   The breakfast buffet was good

Excellent location within a couple of hundred yards of the Eiffel Tower Our room was on the upper floors and was lovely and quiet All the staff we met were very pleasant and extremely efficient and helpful

The bed were two beds made one it was separated all the time  Agathe were amazing she helped us a lot she s giving a lot of information about the city and the places we visit it it s so nice to have employe like her
The fact I paid for a room that was supposed to have a Effel tower view but was stuck on the back side of hotel instead   It was at least close to Eiffel tower

Rooms Quite small Booked a triple room expecting 3 Singles But had a double and a pull out bed but it was comfy Toilet smelly and stained   Lovely Staff Especially Bruno the porter Ideal location right next to the eiffel tower although No view

Only found one waiter who was friendly and helpful out of the entire staff at the hotel Hotel rooms were not replenished throughout the stay only had one bottle of water and six single serves of milk for the four days for two people Although the hotel looks spectacular the service and value for money lets it down the only positive is that it was close to the Eiffel Tower   Location

the pic were mis leading and the aminties werent describe very well for what we paid for I could of stay at a another hotel that encluded everything w it very disappointed in the service all around and for three people very sad to say and our room was dirty and a dirty bed sheet we did not enjoyed it we even left a day earlie because of what happen   only thing that was nice about this hotel is the convience of walking everywhere and the eiftel tower was step away

bed was flat springs coils had no life left bathroom configuration was poorly designed Clash of doors at room entrance frustrating ALSO THE AMOUNT RESERVED ON CREDIT CARD AT CHECKING IN IS ABSOLUTELY ABSURD more than 70 above the room rate is ridiculous   location
Line at reception was often very long Might need more staff during holiday season   Able to get two adjoining rooms Housekeeping very helpful with basic requests Onsite parking reasonably priced

The privilege room is a rip off you only have the potential for the Effiel Tower view and the rooms are a little small Parking is ridiculously expensive 24 hrs parking is 28 euro I parked there for about 32 hours and was charged 55 euro 20 euro for breakfast is way too expensive Never staying here again Wasn t terrible just not worth it Bed is super firm   Very close to the Effiel Tower Metro station close by Nice big shower
Size of the room for the price was compact Could have been bigger  Fantastic location 2 min walk from the Eiffel Tower Parking available For a responsible price

It took more than half an hour to check in waiting in long cue almost to the main gate Only one staff took care of check in in this season and this value hotel Disappointing   Room was very Cozy and hommy Beddings were comfortable

The rooms were so narrow they hide this information from the public We bearly fit in one room it was advertised as a triple room with sofa bed nonsense As well we ve been there on Christmas there were nothing organized for Christmas no children activities or Santa or little presents sad nice location poor organization   Location breakfast clean room

I was waiting for more than half an hour to check in Only two staff were there One for membership customer and another for normal customers How could it possible that only one staff was there for a number of people waiting in long cue almost to the main door   The room is cozy and hommy so I could sleep well during my stay Also the hotel is close by the eiffel tower but more like in safe and clean area
Bathroom was very small even for one person The room had repairs that needed doing curtains were loose   Friendly staff and a good location Easy to park the car and take public transport
Air conditioner didn t work at room The breakfast menu was the same the 5 days that we stayed there it would be better If they can change menu each morning

as well as the high floor extra price they also require a 40 extra per night to have a view of the Eiffel Tower in the room The rooms had a weird smell and staff were not helpful at all   The bed was comfortable and the bathroom was nice

I was a bit surprised to see the room and bathroom s doors were slightly damaged I guess stars are not given based on this The coffee machine didn t work or we could not make it work   Great location as the hotel is close to the Eiffel Tower There are also a few brasseries and restaurants nearby The room was clean and the bed very comfortable Friendly staff upgraded our room upon checking in with a free mini bar with soft drinks

While all the hotels in the world offer a cradle service this hotel force to pay for another bed for the baby when a baby cant sleep in a bed for security reasons We had to change the booked room at last time with no other possibility paying more money Totally disgraceful feeling of fraud

Key card had to be reprogrammed 3 times Toilet is separate from bathroom and has no wash hand basin in it so you have to come out of it and in to the bathroom itself POINTLESS   5 mins walk from Bir Hakiem metro Being so close to the Eiffel Tower and the Seinne

the purple paint in the toilet and bathroom haha The room was quite warm although we were provided a fan it would have been nice if we were able to open a window  location was perfect only a minutes walk to the eiffel tower A few local cafes close by also which were nice Our room was quite warm the staff were very helpful and provided as with a fan which was sufficient
at peak time breakfast the staff could not keep up clearing and resetting the tables not enough cups knives and forks etc  nice comfortable an quiet room
No shower cap in the bathroom They should provide or replace the bottle of water One for the first day is not enough   Nice location The bed was comfortable Excellent breakfast

Very clean property free upgrade on check in which was really nice so free access to the mini bar which they refilled everyday The location is amazing 200m away from the Eiffel Tower with views from the gym and the front door of the hotel
Nothing   We were upgraded as guest of the day Fabulous view of the Eiffel Tower from our room Two free Cruise tickets and a glass of champagne each Restaurant great food Room clean and comfortable
Look and feel of a 70 s Hotel that has never been refurbished  Location is good for those wanting to visit the iconic Tower constructed by Eiffel Parking available Room is reasonably comfortable
Not so comfy bed Misleading as advertised as room with Eiffel view Disappointed with it Coffee machine though available wasn t working but fixed just before checkout

I think that this is not a hotel with the quality to charge prices above 200 euro It is very basic and size of the rooms are really small This time the TV set was not working The staff used to be more friendly this time it was not the case Honestly I have been a frequent guest in this hotel but now I am thinking not to go again   The location of the hotel is excellent Just walking distance from Eiffel Tower and very close to the place I go to work

The hotel lift was under mantainence for over an hour to two We had to climb up to our rooms at level 7 However the hotel was gracious enough to provide us with drinks voucher to make up for it   There was a Nespresso machine for our breakfast which I thought was rather impressive The breakfast range was decent but the croissant was beyond delicious I wish I could turn back time just to have those fluffy croissants There were eggs and ham yoghurt and cornflakes too The bed was comfortable room was a little squeezy but the location of the hotel made up for that The train station was right around the corner Walk just outside the hotel and you see the Eiffel Tower Word of caution to anyone who wishes to visit Paris do make full use of the safe deposit in your hotel room a safe deposit is available in this hotel it is easy to use and for free my mom didn t use it and got mugged near the Eiffel Tower area Also it is well worth noting that the staff in this hotel were extremely helpful The lady at the breakfast reception returned my handphone when I left it at the table I blame the croissants for being so delicious made me forgot the existence of my phone I am ever so grateful to that lady for her honesty and helpfulness Would highly recommend anyone to choose to stay at this hotel
